description: 3D reactive UI component library for IYS customer sites. All MIT licensed, no build step required — loaded via CDN and injected by generate.py at build time.
usage: Add an EFFECTS array to the customer config JSON, e.g. "EFFECTS": ["aos", "vanilla-tilt"]. generate.py injects the component scripts automatically into each HTML file.

tilt.description: 3D mouse-tracking tilt on cards and interactive elements
tilt.recommendation: vanilla-tilt — more widely used, glare effect looks premium

background.description: Animated hero backgrounds — WebGL waves or interactive particles
background.recommendation: vanta-waves for professional/corporate feel; particles for tech/modern feel

scroll.description: Scroll-triggered animations and parallax depth effects
scroll.recommendation: aos adds the most visible polish with zero effort; combine both for full depth
